This folder is intended to host a copy of the StoMADS code for reproducibility.

Due to licensing constraints, we do not redistribute the code directly here.
Please download StoMADS from its official repository or distribution and copy the
contents of their `StoMADS_Main_Files/` folder into:

third_party/StoMADS/StoMADS_Main_Files/

The included wrapper `src/algorithms/stomads_wrapper.m` will add this folder to the MATLAB path.

Cite and respect StoMADS license terms.
